title: status_report
description: Phase 4 corpus status rollup. Emitted by `spectrum-core status --corpus`. One row per source in the corpus manifest, plus one row per source that exists in the data lake but is NOT declared in the manifest (`orphaned_in_lake`). Phase 4 is the initial introduction of this schema; the enum lists below are additive — a future PR may extend `state` or `recommendation` without breaking existing JSON consumers, but must not redefine an existing value.

manifest_hash.description: The manifest_hash of the corpus manifest used to build the rollup. `null` when the manifest could not be loaded (which is a fail-closed condition surfaced via the CLI's exit code; the schema accepts null so a partial diagnostic dump is still valid).

haiku_latest_f1.description: Phase 5 (optional). Most recent Haiku F1 vs the Opus reference for this source, OR null when no Haiku comparison exists. Present only when the status CLI is invoked with --show-all-models; absent in default output (the byte-identical-to-Phase-4 path).

sonnet_latest_f1.description: Phase 5 (optional). Most recent Sonnet F1 vs Opus for this source, OR null when no Sonnet comparison exists. Present only with --show-all-models.

opus_item_count.description: Phase 5 (optional). Number of Opus baseline items for this source, OR null when no Opus baseline exists. Present only with --show-all-models.
